---
title: Comparaison East/Rpart
subtitle: Différence de résultats entre les event sizes et samples sizes obtenuent pour des essais cliniques à 2 bras.
author:
  - name: Bob Dylan
    orcid: 0009-0007-1967-8304
abstract: |
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}
papersize: a4
format: 
  typst
keywords:
  - Quarto
  - Typst
  - format
date: today
date-format: full
logo: medium
brand: brand\_brand.yml
execute:
  echo: false
margin: 
  x: 1in
  y: 1in
lang: "fr"
---

# 

[Basic Typst doc](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/typst.html)


Alpha : 0.01, 0.05, 0.10, 0.20, 0.5
Power : 50%, 80%, 90%, 99%

HR : 0.1, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9, 0.99
3y-surv : 10%, 30%, 60%, 90%


```{r}

```

::: {.block fill="luma(230)" inset="8pt" radius="4pt"}

This is a block with gray background and slightly rounded corners.

:::


new thing written about something
